Package org.apache.bookkeeper.proto

Interface BookkeeperProtocol.RequestOrBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder
All Known Implementing Classes:
BookkeeperProtocol.Request, BookkeeperProtocol.Request.Builder
Enclosing class:
BookkeeperProtocol
public static interface BookkeeperProtocol.RequestOrBuilder extends com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder
